ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这是一个空操作，但可能表明您的应用程序中存在错误。请直接赋值给 `this.state`，或在 %s 组件中定义一个包含所需状态的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The provided key is an unsupported type %s. This value must be coerced to a string before before using it here.
ast.target: 提供的键是不支持的类型 %s。在此处使用之前，必须将此值强制转换为字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Received an unexpected object in getComponentNameFromType(). This is likely a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在 getComponentNameFromType() 中收到了意外的对象。这可能是 React 中的一个错误。请提交一个问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s: `key` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果您需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将其作为不同的 prop 传递。(https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `ref` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s: `ref` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果您需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将其作为不同的 prop 传递。(https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source:
lazy: Expected the result of a dynamic import() call. Instead received: %s

Your code should look like: 
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

Did you accidentally put curly braces around the import?
ast.target:
lazy: 期望动态 import() 调用的结果。但实际收到的是: %s

您的代码应如下所示: 
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

您是否意外地在 import 周围添加了花括号？

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but was given %s.
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个渲染函数，但给定的是 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters: props and ref. %s
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数恰好接受两个参数: props 和 ref。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions do not support propTypes or defaultProps. Did you accidentally pass a React component?
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数不支持 propTypes 或 defaultProps。您是否意外传递了一个 React 组件？

ast.name: error
ast.source: Calling useContext(Context.Provider) is not supported. Did you mean to call useContext(Context) instead?
ast.target: 不支持调用 useContext(Context.Provider)。您是否想调用 useContext(Context)？

ast.name: error
ast.source: disabledDepth fell below zero. This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: disabledDepth 降至零以下。这是 React 中的一个错误。请提交一个问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: type specification of %s `%s` is invalid; the type checker function must return `null` or an `Error` but returned a %s. You may have forgotten to pass an argument to the type checker creator (arrayOf, instanceOf, objectOf, oneOf, oneOfType, and shape all require an argument).
ast.target: %s: %s `%s` 的类型规范无效；类型检查器函数必须返回 `null` 或一个 `Error`，但返回了一个 %s。您可能忘记向类型检查器创建器传递参数（arrayOf、instanceOf、objectOf、oneOf、oneOfType 和 shape 都需要一个参数）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop.%s%s See https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys for more information.
ast.target: 列表中的每个子元素都应有一个唯一的 \"key\" prop。%s%s 有关更多信息，请参阅 https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Component %s declared `PropTypes` instead of `propTypes`. Did you misspell the property assignment?
ast.target: 组件 %s 声明了 `PropTypes` 而不是 `propTypes`。您是否拼错了属性赋值？

ast.name: error
ast.source: getDefaultProps is only used on classic React.createClass definitions. Use a static property named `defaultProps` instead.
ast.target: getDefaultProps 仅用于经典的 React.createClass 定义。请改用名为 `defaultProps` 的静态属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid prop `%s` supplied to `React.Fragment`. React.Fragment can only have `key` and `children` props.
ast.target: 向 `React.Fragment` 提供了无效的 prop `%s`。React.Fragment 只能拥有 `key` 和 `children` prop。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 向 `React.Fragment` 提供了无效的属性 `ref`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You called act(async () => ...) without await. This could lead to unexpected testing behaviour, interleaving multiple act calls and mixing their scopes. You should - await act(async () => ...);
ast.target: 您在没有 await 的情况下调用了 act(async () => ...)。这可能导致意外的测试行为，交错多个 act 调用并混合它们的作用域。您应该 - await act(async () => ...);

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are using an outdated, pre-release alpha of React 18 that does not support useSyncExternalStore. The use-sync-external-store shim will not work correctly. Upgrade to a newer pre-release.
ast.target: 您正在使用一个过时的、预发布的 React 18 alpha 版本，它不支持 useSyncExternalStore。use-sync-external-store shim 将无法正常工作。请升级到更新的预发布版本。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The result of getSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop
ast.target: getSnapshot 的结果应被缓存以避免无限循环

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 使用 AI 快速生成

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %s(...) is deprecated in plain JavaScript React classes. %s
ast.target: %s(...) 在纯 JavaScript React 类中已弃用。%s

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `displayName` on Context.Consumer has no effect. You should set it directly on the context with Context.displayName = '%s'.
ast.target: 在 Context.Consumer 上设置 `displayName` 没有效果。您应该直接在上下文上设置它，使用 Context.displayName = '%s'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Factory.type is deprecated. Access the class directly before passing it to createFactory.
ast.target: Factory.type 已弃用。在将其传递给 createFactory 之前，请直接访问该类。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected a large number of updates inside startTransition. If this is due to a subscription please re-write it to use React provided hooks. Otherwise concurrent mode guarantees are off the table.
ast.target: 检测到在 startTransition 内部有大量更新。如果这是由于订阅引起的，请重写它以使用 React 提供的 hooks。否则，并发模式的保证将失效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] The `destroy` method will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use unsubscribe function returned by subscribe. Everything will be garbage-collected if store is garbage-collected.
ast.target: [已弃用] `destroy` 方法在未来的版本中将不再支持。请改用 subscribe 返回的 unsubscribe 函数。如果 store 被垃圾回收，所有内容都将被垃圾回收。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Use `createWithEqualityFn` instead of `create` or use `useStoreWithEqualityFn` instead of `useStore`. They can be imported from 'zustand/traditional'. https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937
ast.target: [已弃用] 请使用 `createWithEqualityFn` 代替 `create`，或使用 `useStoreWithEqualityFn` 代替 `useStore`。它们可以从 'zustand/traditional' 导入。 https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Passing a vanilla store will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`.
ast.target: [已弃用] 传递 vanilla store 在未来的版本中将不再支持。请改用 `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Default export is deprecated. Instead use `import { create } from 'zustand'`.
ast.target: [已弃用] 默认导出已弃用。请改用 `import { create } from 'zustand'`。

ast.source: Please configure an AI provider first
ast.target: 请先配置一个 AI 提供商
